title: Performance
description: The system must be able to process and analyze a large number of CVs in a timely manner.

title: Reliability
description: The system must be able to accurately parse and analyze CVs, and provide reliable results.

title: Security
description: The system must ensure the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of user data.

title: Privacy
description: The system must protect user data and ensure that it is not shared with third parties without consent.

title: Scalability
description: The system must be able to handle a large number of users and CVs, and scale accordingly.

title: Usability
description: The system must be user-friendly and easy to navigate, with clear and concise instructions.

title: Maintainability
description: The system must be easy to maintain and update, with clear and concise documentation.

title: Compatibility
description: The system must be compatible with a variety of devices and browsers.

title: Integration
description: The system must be able to integrate with other systems and tools, such as HR software and recruitment platforms.
